description:
You are a forensic analyst at the NYPD Crime Lab, Forensic Investigations Division. Detective Martinez has forwarded Case #2023-ASTRO-0441 requesting astronomical analysis. On the evening of February 28, 2023, at approximately 8:00 PM local time (March 1, 2023, 01:00 UTC), a witness at the Bethesda Fountain area of Central Park, NYC (40.7736 N, 73.9712 W, altitude 25m) reported seeing two extremely bright star-like objects positioned very close together, low in the western sky.

Determine whether this celestial observation is consistent with the actual sky at that date, time, and location using Stellarium. Capture screenshots of each identified object and one wide-angle screenshot showing both objects in context with the western sky to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Write a forensic analysis report to /home/ga/Desktop/forensic_sky_report.txt. The report must include the case number (2023-ASTRO-0441), the names of the identified objects, and a conclusion on whether the witness's description is consistent with the astronomical data.
